questions.question: Which therapists & mental health in Miami Fl are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Therapists & Mental Health in Miami Fl with weekend hours include: Lotus Counseling (Sat: 09:00-16:00), Jenny Craig (Sat: 08:00-15:00), Jackson Behavioral Health Hospital (Sat: 00:00 - 24:00), The Learning Tree (Sun: 09:00-17:00). 4 total with weekend availability.
